fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the line.

fields.name: Source Type
fields.tooltip: Contains the table number of the source table for this line.

fields.name: Source Subtype
fields.tooltip: Contains the source subtype of the document to which the line relates.

fields.name: Source No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the source document that the entry originates from.

fields.name: Source Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line number of the source document that the entry originates from.

fields.name: Source Document
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of document that the line relates to.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the location from which the items on the line were shipped.

fields.name: Shelf No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the shelf number of the item for informational use.

fields.name: Bin Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bin where the items are picked or put away.

fields.name: Zone Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the zone where the bin on this posted shipment line is located.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item that has been shipped.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity that was shipped.

fields.name: Qty. (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity that was shipped, in the base unit of measure.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.

fields.name: Qty. per Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of base units of measure, that are in the unit of measure, specified for the item on the line.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the item on the line.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies the a second description of the item on the line, if any.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the due date of the line.

fields.name: Destination Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of destination associated with the posted warehouse shipment line.

fields.name: Destination No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the customer, vendor, or location to which the items have been shipped.

fields.name: Shipping Advice
fields.tooltip: Specifies the shipping advice for the posted warehouse shipment line.

fields.name: Shipment Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the shipment date of the warehouse shipment. The program copies it from the posted source document line.

fields.name: Posted Source Document
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of source document associated with the line.

fields.name: Posted Source No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document number of the posted source document.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Contains the posting date, which the program copies from the posted source document line.

fields.name: Whse. Shipment No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies document number of the warehouse shipment from which the line originates.

fields.name: Whse Shipment Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies document line number of the warehouse shipment line from which the line originates.
